prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约8145→7575→7177→44683→12558。2024年出现异常断档（位次暴跌至44683），2025年大幅回升至12558，但仍明显高于2021–2023年水平（约7100–8100），近3年整体后移约5400名；2025年基准约12558名；该校在四川理科（物理类）招生计划2021年101人、2022年105人、2023年119人、2024年113人、2025年99人；2026年计划109人，较2025年扩招约10.1%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解、位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学为985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学主榜排名稳定在第22名（2021年第21名），属于全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要受2019年学伴事件舆情遗留影响；但抖音综合热度排名第20（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度仍较高；2024年四川理科曾出现投档线断档（从639分降至576分），对次年报考心理有一定滞后影响；拥有数学A+、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马克思主义理论A等19个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、临床医学等专业社会热度持续高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数约535000人，较2025年（约462767人）增加约15.6%，竞争加剧；山东大学位于山东省济南市，非四川省本地高校，无本地保护性招生倾斜；2025年物理类在四川招生99人，占比较小，跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12558名、2026年扩招约10.1%（使位次数字增大）、本省考生总数大幅增加约15.6%（使位次数字减小）以及学校声誉偏负面等因素：扩招与考生增加对冲后竞争略加剧，预测最低位次约13269名，区间12769–13769名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 8145 → 7575 → 7177 → 44683 → 12558. In 2024, there was an abnormal gap (ranking plummeted to 44683), and in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 12558, but still notably higher than the 2021–2023 level (about 7100–8100). Over the past 3 years, the overall ranking has shifted back by about 5400 places; the 2025 baseline is about 12558. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for science (physics category) was 101 in 2021, 105 in 2022, 119 in 2023, 113 in 2024, and 99 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 109, an increase of about 10.1% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly and increasing the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; it ranks steadily at 22nd (21st in 2021) on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, placing it among the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the lingering impact of the 2019 'study partner' incident; however, its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, so application attention remains high; in 2024, there was a gap in the admission score line for science in Sichuan (dropping from 639 to 576), which has a lagging psychological effect on the following year's applications; it has 19 A- or above disciplines including Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, and Marxist Theory A, with strong disciplinary strength, attracting strong interest from candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 462,767), intensifying competition; Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, not a local university in Sichuan, so there is no local protective enrollment bias; in 2025, it enrolled 99 students in the physics category in Sichuan, a relatively small proportion, and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12558, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.1% (increasing the ranking number), the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates by about 15.6% (decreasing the ranking number), and the somewhat negative reputation of the university: after offsetting the expansion and candidate increase, competition slightly intensifies, and the predicted minimum ranking is about 13269, with a range of 12769–13769.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12769–13769, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12700), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Clinical Medicine (Qilu Medical Hall) and Mathematics; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 13700), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1359 → 2212 → 1803 → 1851 → 2198. In recent years, the ranking fluctuated between 1800 and 2200, with a baseline of about 2198 in 2025, showing a slight overall backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Sichuan was 26 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 42, an increase of about 16.7% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically eases competition and increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; it ranks steadily at 22nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, placing it among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the lingering impact of the 2019 study partner incident. However, its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), indicating still high application attention. It has A-level disciplines in Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Language and Literature, Marxist Theory, A- in Law, and A- in Archaeology, with strong humanities and history disciplines that attract liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Teacher Training/Education are socially popular and recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, not a local university in Sichuan, so there is no local protective enrollment bias. In 2025, it enrolled 36 history category students in Sichuan, and cross-provincial applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2198, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 16.7% (which increases the ranking number), and the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates by about 15.6% (which decreases the ranking number), the expansion and candidate increase offset each other, resulting in slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2388, with a range of 2048–2728.
